title: [Dungeon]
description: This dim dungeon corridor curves gently from south to west.  The bare stone walls are cold to the touch and slick with a layer of moist condensation.  Thin rivulets of water creep down the face of the walls, dripping slowly to pool on the floor and leave filmy puddles.  Occasionally, a small black beetle scurries across the grey rock floor and slips into a crack in the wall, disturbed by your presence.
